parameters.content:
## IA4SDLC - Cleanup

**Limpia todas las tablas de contenido generado.**
NO toca las tablas de datos COBOL.

**Tablas limpiadas:**
- content_generation_status
- use_cases
- technical_docs
- quality_audits
- onboarding_content

**Requiere confirmación explícita:**
```
POST /webhook/ia4sdlc-cleanup
{ "confirm": true }
```

⚠️ Después correr Init Content Status
para reinicializar el tracking.

parameters.query:
WITH
  d1 AS (DELETE FROM cobol_analysis.content_generation_status RETURNING 1),
  d2 AS (DELETE FROM cobol_analysis.use_cases RETURNING 1),
  d3 AS (DELETE FROM cobol_analysis.technical_docs RETURNING 1),
  d4 AS (DELETE FROM cobol_analysis.quality_audits RETURNING 1),
  d5 AS (DELETE FROM cobol_analysis.onboarding_content RETURNING 1)
SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM d1) AS content_generation_status,
  (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM d2) AS use_cases,
  (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM d3) AS technical_docs,
  (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM d4) AS quality_audits,
  (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM d5) AS onboarding_content
